Hallelujah, meaning praise ye the Lord: that is, praise Jehovah - there are 4 Alleluias in this section.
Praise ye the Lord: Praise him who all things did create; Praise him who all things did redeem; Exalt his name and seek his faceO praise ye the Lord.
